highlights.text: I wrote on Tuesday at 4pm that: “Bear case tomorrow: ES needs to lose 6832-29….
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean if I had to give one is ES can retest 6818-22 again.
Readers know that in ES every elevator down sell (like yesterday) is followed by an equally violent short squeeze.
These only occur though when my core setup (the Failed breakdown) presents.
Last evening we got a planned Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the monster Failed Breakdown we had last Friday which produced the 60 point squeeze into Monday’s high which was the high of week.

post_title: Is Today's SPX Bounce A Dead Cat Bounce, Or Bottom? December 19 Plan
